key_facts: Title: "Carbonate based marine life survival against pH"
Left Y: Marine life percentage survival % (0-100)
3 series: Blue (carbonate life), Yellow (toxic dinoflagellate), Red (pH)
Yellow line maxes out ~2044 then flat
Annotation: "Current position, 50% of all marine life lost since 1950" (~2020)
Annotation: "atmosphere starts to become toxic due to dinoflagellate toxins"
Annotation: "Domoic acid produced by dinoflagellate starts to cause brain damage..." (NOT Atomic/Domotic/Domoc)
Annotation: "The tipping point, or point of no return for carbonate marine life" (~2042)
Annotation: "...mass stravation of billions of people" (original typo for starvation)

key_hits: Title correct
X-axis 1940-2100 correct
Left Y, Right Y labels correct
3 series correctly identified with colors and legend labels
Blue line declines to ~0% by 2060 (matches GT)
Red pH line 8.2 -> 7.9, ending 2070 (correct)
"Current position, 50% of all marine life lost since 1950" correctly transcribed
"Domoic acid... brain damage in whales, seals, birds, sea otters" correct
"atmosphere starts to become toxic due to dinoflagellate toxins" correct
"The tipping point, or point of no return for carbonate marine life" correct
"mass starvation of billions of people" (corrected from typo - acceptable)
key_misses: Opening says range "1950 and 2100" then later "1940 to 2100" — minor inconsistency
Blue line "starts at 100% survival in 1950" — should be 1940
pH line "starts at 8.2 in 1950" — should be 1940
Did not explicitly mention yellow curve maxes out then goes flat
hallucinations: Says green circle is at ~2020 then places tipping point at 2045 and final collapse at 2048 — final collapse should be ~2060
judgments.justification: Strong transcription of all 5 annotations including the difficult Domoic acid text. Main errors are the 1950 vs 1940 starting year slip in the data series section (X-axis itself is correctly stated as 1940-2100) and slightly compressed timeline (2060 vs 2048 for collapse). No fabricated content.

key_misses: Repeated the "Current position" annotation twice
Repeated the bottom caption twice
Says "four distinct data lines" but only 3 exist
Did not note yellow curve maxes ~2044 then flat
Truncated mid-sentence at end ("Future Projectio")
hallucinations: Fabricated annotation "Domoic acid starts to become toxic due to dinoflagellate toxins" — this text does not exist; the toxic-atmosphere line is separate from Domoic acid line
Placed Current position near 1950 instead of 2020
judgments.justification: Got the title, axes, and legend right, but invented an extra annotation that doesn't exist on the chart, duplicated two annotations, and made an OCR slip on "brain damage". Truncation at end suggests output was cut off.

key_hits: Title correct

key_misses: Said yellow line "Reaches 8.2 by 2100" — confused pH scale with survival scale
Said yellow rises "after 2040" — actually maxes ~2044
Did not capture blue line bottoms at 2060
hallucinations: Said red pH line "Starts at 100 (in 1940) and decreases from 100 to ~7.9" — confused pH line with survival percentage scale (should start at 8.2)
Said blue/yellow cross "slightly later" than 2020 — blue/yellow cross is the actual 50%/2020 point
Said bottom caption is "bottom-left (near 2100)" — internally inconsistent
judgments.justification: Confused the pH scale (7.9-8.2) with the survival percentage scale (0-100), claiming pH line starts at 100 and yellow line reaches 8.2. This is a serious axis/scale confusion. Also has OCR errors (Domotic) and several internal contradictions.

Said pH reaches 7.9 by 2080 (GT: 2070)

judgments.justification: Title, axes, legend, and most annotations are correct. Main issues are timeline imprecision (events placed at 2080 instead of 2044-2070), an OCR slip on Domoic acid, and incorrect marker color attribution. The tipping point annotation is duplicated.

key_hits: Title correct
X-axis 1940-2100 with explicit 20-year ticks correct
Both Y-axis labels and ranges correct
Blue line 100%->50% at 2020->near 0% by 2060 (matches GT 2060 bottoming)
Red pH line 8.2 in 1940, 7.9 by ~2060-2070 (close to GT 2070)
Green circle at 2020 noted
"Current position, 50% of all marine life lost since 1950" correct
"The tipping point, or point of no return for carbonate marine life" correct
"Domoic acid produced by dinoflagellate starts to cause brain damage in whales, seals, birds, sea otters" correctly transcribed
"atmosphere starts to become toxic due to dinoflagellate toxins" correct
"mass stravation of billions of people" — correctly preserved the original chart typo (rare and impressive)
key_misses: Said yellow line reaches 100% by 2060 (GT: maxes ~2044 then flat)
Said "four distinct data lines" — only 3 real lines plus the green marker
Tipping point described as where blue drops below 20% (GT: ~2042)
judgments.justification: Most accurate of the 6: blue line bottoming year (2060) and pH end (7.9) both match GT closely, all 5 annotations transcribed including the difficult Domoic acid text, and uniquely preserved the original chart's "stravation" typo verbatim. Only notable miss is yellow line maxing year (2044 vs stated 2060).

key_hits: Title correct
X-axis 1940-2100 correct
Both Y-axis labels and ranges correct
Legend with 3 lines correct
Blue line: 100% in 1940, linear decline, near 0% by 2060 (matches GT)
Red pH line: 8.2 in 1940, declining (correct)
Yellow line: ~20% in 1940, flat until ~1970, then rises sharply (matches GT shape)
"atmosphere starts to become toxic due to dinoflagellate toxins" correct
"Domoic acid produced by dinoflagellate starts to cause brain damage in whales, seals, birds, sea otters..." correct
"Current position, 50% of all marine life lost since 1950" correct
"The tipping point, or point of no return for carbonate marine life" correct
Bottom caption with run-away climate change and mass starvation transcribed
key_misses: Said yellow reaches "near 100% by 2040" (GT: maxes ~2044 then flat — close)
Said red pH drops "below 7.95 by 2060" (GT: ends 7.9 at 2070 — close)
Said blue line intersects red pH line around 2020 — they are on different axes, so any intersection is visually approximate
hallucinations: Said "Domoic acid produced by dinoflagellates" (added plural 's' — minor OCR slip)
Green circle placement description says "at intersection of blue and red lines" — but red is pH on right axis, so this conflates the two scales
judgments.justification: Strong on all 5 annotations and the curve shapes (especially noting yellow's flat-then-rise shape). Timeline years (1940, 2020, 2060) mostly match GT. Main weakness is conflating the dual axes (blue vs red 'intersection' is meaningless across different scales) and minor OCR slip on 'dinoflagellates'.
